# neon_role_password (Ephemeral Resource)

Retrieves the password for a Neon role. The password is ephemeral and will not be stored in Terraform state.

## Example Usage

```terraform
ephemeral "neon_role_password" "example" {
  project_id = neon_project.example.id
  branch_id  = neon_branch.example.id
  role_name  = neon_role.example.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `branch_id` (String) The branch ID.
- `project_id` (String) The Neon project ID.
- `role_name` (String) The role name.

### Read-Only

- `password` (String, Sensitive) The role password.
